title: Update native LICHEN BLE client discovery for LCI UUIDs
description:
Update native client/tooling discovery notes and implementation so clients probe the LICHEN-specific native BLE LCI service before legacy NUS, never use NUS fallback when MeshCore compatibility is advertised, and surface protocol version/capability reads from the direct BLE LCI service.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Native clients or discovery documentation probe the LICHEN-specific native BLE LCI service before legacy NUS.
- Clients do not use native NUS fallback when MeshCore compatibility is advertised.
- Client-visible behavior includes protocol version and four-octet capabilities reads.
- Migration behavior for legacy mutually exclusive native NUS images is documented or tested.
